game.title.description: Name of the Star Swarm game card.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Star Swarm game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Star Swarm play button.

game.canvasLabel.description: Accessible label for the game canvas — describes game and interaction.

hud.score.description: Short uppercase label for the current score in the HUD.

hud.best.description: Short uppercase label for the high score in the HUD.

hud.wave.description: Short uppercase label for the current wave number in the HUD.

phase.waveClear.description: Overlay text shown for a moment when the player clears a wave.

phase.challengingStage.description: Overlay text shown at the start of a bonus Challenging Stage wave.
phase.challengingStage.notes: Borrowed from Galaga — keep the arcade feel.

phase.hits.description: Sub-line during Challenging Stage showing how many enemies the player has hit.

phase.gameOver.description: Large overlay text when the player loses all lives.

score.display.description: Accessibility label for the score display.
